nasb.text: And an angel of the Lord appeared to him, standing to the right of the altar of incense.

esv.text: And there appeared to him an angel of the Lord standing on the right side of the altar of incense.

cnv.text: 有主的使者站在香壇右邊，向他顯現。

ccb.text: 那时，主的天使在香坛的右边向撒迦利亚显现，

csbs.text: 有主的一位天使站在香坛的右边向他显现。
